nasb.text: They told the king, saying, “Here is Nathan the prophet.” And when he came in before the king, he prostrated himself before the king with his face to the ground.

esv.text: And they told the king, “Here is Nathan the prophet.” And when he came in before the king, he bowed before the king, with his face to the ground.

cnv.text: 有人告訴王說：“拿單先知來了。”拿單來到王面前，向王叩拜。

ccb.text: 有人奏告王，说：“拿单先知来了。”拿单来到王面前，俯伏在地，
